kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://cp353004-team2-5.onrender.com/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "driver", "password": "Admin1234!"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://cp353004-team2-5.onrender.com/api/vehicles path_url=/api/vehicles headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW11dmNlZXMwMDAxbXJ1ZmZjbmk2bnB6Iiwicm9sZSI6IkRSSVZFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3Mzc2ODMwNCwiZXhwIjoxNzczODU0NzA0fQ.lFS0GmRTvteE3SCZmKliijDQtKaj5tqyxpUuE8Q36aA'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${vehicles} = [{'id': 'cmmuvlonr000cmruf0erqjyxs', 'userId': 'cmmuvcees0001mruffcni6npz', 'vehicleModel': 'ToyotaCamry', 'licensePlate': 'กก1234ขอนแก่น', 'vehicleType': 'Sedan', 'color': 'สีขาว', 'seatCapacity': 4,...
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.msg: ${first} = {'id': 'cmmuvlonr000cmruf0erqjyxs', 'userId': 'cmmuvcees0001mruffcni6npz', 'vehicleModel': 'ToyotaCamry', 'licensePlate': 'กก1234ขอนแก่น', 'vehicleType': 'Sedan', 'color': 'สีขาว', 'seatCapacity': 4, ...
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://cp353004-team2-5.onrender.com/api/routes path_url=/api/routes headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW11dmNlZXMwMDAxbXJ1ZmZjbmk2bnB6Iiwicm9sZSI6IkRSSVZFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3Mzc2ODMwNCwiZXhwIjoxNzczODU0NzA0fQ.lFS0GmRTvteE3SCZmKliijDQtKaj5tqyxpUuE8Q36aA', 'Content-Length': '337', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"vehicleId": "cmmuvlonr000cmruf0erqjyxs", "startLocation": {"lat": 13.7563, "lng": 100.5018, "address": "Pickup Point"}, "endLocation": {"lat": 13.746, "lng": 100.5231, "address": "Dropoff Point"}, "departureTime": "2026-03-17T17:30:02.563801Z", "availableSeats": 1, "pricePerSeat": 150, "routeSummary": "Test route for reporting flow"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://cp353004-team2-5.onrender.com/api/bookings path_url=/api/bookings headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW11djg2c2YwMDAwbXJ1ZjRscWZqcDh1Iiwicm9sZSI6IlBBU1NFTkdFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3Mzc2ODMwNCwiZXhwIjoxNzczODU0NzA0fQ.rHwZdGLc04A6dSYRdwZiFlZmQ9DMz33hkDn7ATbnnsw', 'Content-Length': '221', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"routeId": "cmmuvunfa001amrufl9nl2sit", "numberOfSeats": 1, "pickupLocation": {"lat": 13.7563, "lng": 100.5018, "address": "Pickup Point"}, "dropoffLocation": {"lat": 13.746, "lng": 100.5231, "address": "Dropoff Point"}}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.
